title: The Captain’s Decision
description: Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Usopp, Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji. Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: They're the same!! Going Going Merry is alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't talk like you know everything, punk!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fine!! If you don't like my decision,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Calm down!! Watch what you say!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Since that's what you really feel!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No... I am. I've thought about it...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I only went because you invited me...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: just shut up and get on board...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, usopp! Where are you going!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I go where I want to go.

summary: Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.
